Title: LinkedIn Profile Audit
Description: A structured check of the key LinkedIn sections that influence recruiter visibility and first impressions.
SchemaJson: {"id":"linkedin_profile_audit_v1","title":"LinkedIn Profile Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"How complete is your LinkedIn profile?","options":["All Star (LinkedIn says it is complete)","Mostly complete","Partially filled in","Very minimal","I do not have a LinkedIn profile"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How strong is your LinkedIn headline — does it go beyond just your job title?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Do you have recommendations on your profile?","options":["Yes, three or more","Yes, one or two","No, but I plan to ask","No"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How consistently do you post or engage with content on LinkedIn?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What is the main thing stopping you from improving your LinkedIn profile?","required":false}]}
